entity.summary: Metis decentralized exchange protocol designed for low-cost, low-slippage trading across correlated and uncorrelated assets, with liquidity incentives centered on protocol fees.
entity.notes: Current first-party Hermes Protocol application endpoint remains reachable as a JavaScript app. DefiLlama independently classifies Hermes Protocol as a Metis DEX, reports current TVL and cumulative DEX volume, and describes low-cost, low-slippage trading design. HEI consolidates the Hermes V1 source row under this entity.

evidence.title: Hermes Protocol application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Hermes Protocol JavaScript application endpoint remains reachable.

evidence.title: Hermes Protocol metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Hermes Protocol as a Metis DEX for low-cost, near-zero-slippage trading across correlated and uncorrelated assets and reports current TVL and cumulative volume.

evidence.title: Hermes Protocol DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Hermes Protocol and its version source row; HEI consolidates them into one exchange entity.
